hero.subtitle: Turn your business documents into intelligent AI agents. No coding required — train, deploy, and manage in minutes.

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to build, deploy, and manage intelligent AI agents.

items.title: Custom AI Agents
items.body: Create specialized AI agents tailored to your specific business needs and use cases.

items.title: Train with Your Own Data
items.body: Upload PDF, TXT, CSV and other documents to train your AI agent with your knowledge base.

items.title: One API per Agent
items.body: Each AI agent gets its own dedicated API endpoint for seamless integration into any platform.

items.title: Built-in Analytics
items.body: Track performance, usage, and insights with a comprehensive analytics dashboard.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: Get your AI agent up and running in 5 simple steps.

steps.title: Create an account
steps.body: Sign up for free and access your AgentLab dashboard in seconds.

steps.title: Create an AI agent
steps.body: Define your agent's purpose and configure its behavior and personality.

steps.title: Upload your data
steps.body: Train your agent with PDFs, TXT files, CSV and other documents.

steps.title: Generate agent API
steps.body: Get your unique API endpoint with authentication keys for integration.

steps.title: Deploy anywhere
steps.body: Integrate your AI agent into websites, apps, or any platform.

useCases.sectionTitle:
Powerful AI agents
for every business need

items.title: Customer Support Chatbots
items.body: Automate customer inquiries with intelligent chatbots trained on your support documentation.

items.title: Internal Company Assistants
items.body: Help employees find information quickly with AI assistants trained on internal resources.

items.title: Knowledge Base Bots
items.body: Transform your documentation into an interactive AI that answers questions instantly.

items.title: SaaS AI Integrations
items.body: Add intelligent features to your SaaS product with custom-trained AI capabilities.

items.title: Instant Responses
items.body: Never miss a customer query with AI agents that work around the clock.

items.title: Reduce Support Costs
items.body: Automate repetitive tasks and scale support without hiring more staff.

items.title: Accurate, Data-Driven
items.body: Leverage RAG technology to provide precise responses based on your data.

items.title: Easy API Integration
items.body: Simple REST API integration that works with any platform or framework.

widget.noWidgetSubtitle: Create a widget to embed your agent anywhere
widget.howToUse: How to add to your website
widget.step1Desc: Click the copy button next to the embed code at the top of this panel.
widget.step2Desc: Find the file that contains your website's HTML code — usually called index.html. Paste the code just before the </body> closing tag.
widget.step3Desc: Save the file and open your website. You'll see a chat button appear in the bottom-right corner of every page.
widget.warningKey: Never share your public key with anyone. It gives access to your agent.
